zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange是Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere和Ankaret Boteler的女兒，於1336年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾爾本。她於1363年與Sir Richard Pembridge在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange是Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere和Ankaret Boteler的女儿，于1336年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾爾本。她于1363年与Sir Richard Pembridge在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sean, Kieran, Seamus, Aileen, Dermot, Liam, Niall, Brennan, Brigid, Conal, Conan, Donal.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDougall , McDowell .

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange was born in 1336, in Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere and Ankaret Boteler. She married Sir Richard Pembridge in 1363, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange est née en 1336, à Shirburn, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere et Ankaret Boteler. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Pembridge en 1363, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange wurde 1336 in Shirburn, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere und Ankaret Boteler geboren. Sie hat 1363 in Shropshire, England Sir Richard Pembridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange è nata il nel 1336 nel Shirburn, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere e Ankaret Boteler. Lei sposato Sir Richard Pembridge nel 1363, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strangeは1336年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイルブルンでSir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of BlackmereとAnkaret Botelerの娘として生まれた。1363年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでSir Richard Pembridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange(은)는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 실르번에서 Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere(와)과 Ankaret Boteler의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Sir Richard Pembridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange nasceu em 1336, em Shirburn, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere e Ankaret Boteler. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Pembridge em 1363, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange родилась в 1336 г. в местности ширбурн, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere и Ankaret Boteler. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Pembridge в 1363 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Strange nació en 1336, en Shirburn, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Sir John le Strange 2nd Lord Strange of Blackmere y Ankaret Boteler. Se casó con Sir Richard Pembridge en 1363, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
